summary: All 6 steps completed. Step 1: wrote failing test verifying currentFile/attachedContexts forwarding (failed as expected). Step 2: fixed App.tsx onSend to pass context directly instead of cherry-picking 3 fields. Step 3: added compile-time type assertion in claudeBridge.test.ts. Step 4: replaced standalone ClaudeMessageContext interface with re-export of MessageContext. Step 5: simplified types.typecheck.ts by removing redundant structural sync guard. Step 6: full test suite verification — 856 tests pass, tsc clean.

Step 7: Rebased task/518 onto origin/main — branch now at 45b6562c (same as main HEAD), zero unique commits. Step 8: Post-rebase verification — bridge.ts re-exports MessageContext as ClaudeMessageContext, App.tsx passes context directly, 930 tests pass, tsc clean. All 8 plan steps complete.

Rebase task/518 onto current main to resolve merge_ff_failed. All task commits (steps 1-6) are already in main's history — the branch is an ancestor of main. The rebase fast-forwards the branch pointer to main HEAD. Verify with `git log --oneline origin/main..task/518` showing no unique commits.; Post-rebase verification: (1) Confirm task changes are preserved on main — bridge.ts re-exports MessageContext as ClaudeMessageContext, App.tsx passes context directly to claudeSendMessage. (2) Run full gui test suite (`vitest run`) to confirm no regressions from upstream changes that landed during the merge window.

Post-escalation verification: merge conflict resolved by handler (fast-forward to main). All 8 plan steps remain done. bridge.ts re-exports MessageContext as ClaudeMessageContext, App.tsx passes context directly. 935 GUI tests pass, no regressions.
Rebased onto main (0cd61b69 -> 266111d5), 22 files changed

Step 9: rebase already done by orchestrator (266111d5). Step 10: wrote completion_after_dot_defined_struct_returns_only_members test with positive (a, b present) AND negative (no keywords/functions/types) assertions. Step 11: all 191 LSP tests pass. Step 12: 937 GUI tests pass, 1 unique commit on branch, FF merge possible. All 12 plan steps complete.

Rebase task/518 onto current main to resolve merge_ff_failed (second occurrence). Main has advanced again since step-7. All task-518 changes (steps 1-6) remain in main's history. Reset branch to main HEAD. Verify no divergent task-518 commits are lost (the 20 divergent commits on the branch are task-management auto-commits from other tasks, not task-518 work).; Write new test `completion_after_dot_defined_struct_returns_only_members` in crates/reify-lsp/src/completion.rs, placed immediately after the existing `completion_after_dot_returns_only_members` test (after line 626). The test defines structure Foo with params a (Scalar) and b (Scalar), then structure Bar with `sub part: Foo` and `let x = part.` with cursor after the dot. It makes positive assertions (`var_labels.contains("a")`, `var_labels.contains("b")`, `!var_labels.is_empty()`) AND negative assertions (`keyword_labels.is_empty()`, `func_labels.is_empty()`, `type_labels.is_empty()`). This addresses the vacuous_test finding — the existing exclusion-only test remains as a complement for the undefined-type case.; Run `cargo test -p reify-lsp` to verify the new test passes (the implementation already handles defined-struct dot-access correctly, as proven by the existing `completion_after_dot_includes_known_members` test) and all existing LSP tests are not regressed.; Post-fix verification: (1) Run full gui test suite (`vitest run`) to confirm GUI changes from steps 1-6 are still intact after rebase. (2) Confirm `git log --oneline main..task/518` shows only the new completion test commit. (3) Verify branch is fast-forward mergeable into main.

Post-escalation resume: branch task/518 is 1 commit ahead of main (completion test), FF-mergeable. All 12 plan steps done. Verified: bridge.ts re-exports MessageContext as ClaudeMessageContext, App.tsx passes context directly, 3/3 dot-completion LSP tests pass, 938/938 GUI tests pass. Task complete.
Rebased onto main (266111d5 -> 30745701), 6 files changed

Step 13: Cherry-picked 2 work commits (d7fbb338 validatePayload refactor, 840e373d completion test) onto origin/main (48ee6cfb), discarding 9 .taskmaster auto-commits. Branch now exactly 2 commits ahead, no noise. Step 14: All tests pass — 181 LSP tests (3 dot-completion), 938 GUI tests (53 files). No .taskmaster in diff. FF-mergeable confirmed. All 14 plan steps complete.

Clean rebase for third merge_ff_failed. The branch has 4 commits ahead of origin/main (48ee6cfb): 2 task-518 work commits (6d93eb77 validatePayload refactor, f9cbe263 completion test) and 2 .taskmaster/tasks.json auto-commits that must not reach main. Procedure: (1) `git fetch origin main`, (2) create temp branch from origin/main, (3) cherry-pick only the two work commits: `git cherry-pick 6d93eb77 f9cbe263`, (4) force-update task/518 to the clean result, (5) delete temp branch. Verify with `git log --oneline origin/main..task/518` showing exactly 2 commits (no .taskmaster noise). Confirm `git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main task/518` returns true (ff-mergeable).; Post-rebase verification: (1) Run `cargo test -p reify-lsp` to confirm the completion test (f9cbe263) is intact and passes. (2) Run `vitest run` in gui/ to confirm the validatePayload refactor (6d93eb77) and all prior GUI changes are intact — claudeBridge.test.ts, App.test.tsx, types.typecheck.ts all pass. (3) Verify `git diff origin/main..task/518 -- .taskmaster/` is empty (no task management files in diff). (4) Confirm branch is ff-mergeable: `git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main task/518`.

Post-escalation resume: escalation handler rebased but .taskmaster auto-commits reappeared. Re-did step-13 cherry-pick: picked 2 work commits (30a737e9 validatePayload, 91fcdb97 completion test) onto fresh origin/main base. Step-14 verified: 3/3 LSP dot-completion tests pass, 938/938 GUI tests pass, zero .taskmaster diff, FF-mergeable. Branch clean with exactly 2 commits.
Rebased onto main (30745701 -> 541cc89c), 1 files changed

Verification: all LSP tests pass, 938/938 GUI tests pass, zero .taskmaster diff, only 3 expected files changed (completion.rs, bridge.ts, claudeBridge.test.ts). All 16 plan steps complete.

(3) Verify `git log --oneline origin/main..task/518` shows exactly 2 commits. (4) Confirm `git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main task/518` returns true. (5) Push updated branch.; Post-rebase verification for fourth merge retry: (1) Run `cargo test -p reify-lsp` to confirm the completion test is intact. (2) Run `vitest run` in gui/ to confirm all GUI tests pass. (3) Verify `git diff origin/main..task/518 -- .taskmaster/` is empty. (4) Verify `git diff origin/main..task/518` shows only changes in completion.rs, bridge.ts, and claudeBridge.test.ts — the 3 expected files.
